title: aegis-event-chain-integrity protocol
description: AEGIS event-chain integrity protocol identifier registered into adapter.protocol-or-transport per D29 namespacing + D40 §B canonical-first-example + D76 §B (closes Phase C C8 per D68 §A closure item (g)). NOT an adapter — registered under the protocol-or-transport vocabulary slot because integrity protocols are a registered protocol-or-transport category at framework-core per D40 §B (parallel to mcp-client / a2a-peer transport identifiers; the integrity-protocol category is one of three D29-namespaced categories: kind / capability / protocol-or-transport). Activation: workspace's composition.substrate-bindings[i].configuration.integrity-protocol = 'aegis-protocol-ext:aegis-event-chain-integrity' opts the workspace into per-event AEGIS stamping + boot-time chain verification. Algorithm: SHA-256(JCS(event) || prev_hash) hash chain + Ed25519 per-event signing; first event prev_hash = SHA-256(workspace_id). JCS via RFC 8785 (rfc8785 Python lib). Per-workspace Ed25519 keypair persists as integrity-private-key.pem (mode 600) + integrity-public-key.pem next to events.jsonl; key bootstrap on first stamp. Per scope-cut C12 + D76 §D: production key management (KMS / HSM) is Phase D+. Phase C scope: in-process mockable harness only; EU AI Act Article 12 audit-record-bundle format deferred per D24 + D68 §D external-trigger 2026-08-02.
